# HTTPS URL for Full Year Time Series Data

*direct link (HTTPS)  to download the one-year hindcast time series (parquet) for this location. Includes speed, direction, for 10 uniform sigma levels at half-hourly (lower 48) or hourly (Alaska) intervals*
